perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a beige vest sits on the floor in a studio setting, speaking animatedly to the camera and a group behind him. (2) Behind him on a gray sofa, several people hold small whiteboards, listening and reacting. (3) A woman in a red-and-white shirt speaks while the main man looks down as if embarrassed. (4) The scene cuts between various people laughing and the main man's facial expressions. (5) The group holds up their whiteboards to reveal their answers ('A' or 'C'). (6) The main man reveals the correct answer on a laptop screen, leading to more laughter and discussion.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced background music plays throughout. (2) A male voice speaks rapidly in Mandarin with a humorous and energetic tone. (3) Multiple voices of men and women are heard laughing and talking simultaneously. (4) Sound effects such as a 'ding' or variety-show style cues occasionally punctuate the dialogue. (5) The volume remains high and energetic until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '蔡阿嘎影片知識王#4' - Decorative variety-show title. (2) '老照系列中 蔡阿嘎拿過以下哪張證照?' - Functional question text. (3) Options listed: 'a. 閩南語檢定', 'b. 乙級廚師證照', 'c. 保母證照' - Functional choice text. (4) '(概括承受)', '算了 啦無所謂', '(我就沒人愛阿)' - Decorative emotional captions. (5) '保母證照' - Functional answer text in large green font. (6) '甚至有蘿拉', '甚至幫忙煮麵' - Functional variety-show captions providing context.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Question Intro -> Group Discussion -> Answer Reveal -> Post-reveal Banter

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 male staff member, and 4 female staff members sitting on the sofa.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Adult male with dyed brown hair, wearing a white t-shirt, a beige utility vest, denim shorts, and yellow sneakers.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A brightly lit indoor studio designed like a living room with white walls, a gray sofa, stuffed animals, a lamp, and a 'HAHABABY' logo sign.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Question Setting -> Participant Response -> Reveal -> Commentary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is an entertainment piece designed to engage fans through a trivia format. The YouTuber Cai A-ga tests his staff's knowledge of his personal certifications (specifically revealing he has a childcare/nanny license), using humor and fast-paced interaction to build a sense of community and fun around his personal brand.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Presence of 'HAHABABY' branding, variety-style heavy text overlays, and the creator's signature high-energy comedic delivery.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows standard Taiwanese YouTube variety trends with emphasis on group dynamics and rapid-fire subtitles.
